examples.title: Catalan Numbers GF
examples.description: Generates Catalan numbers using their generating function
examples.code:
FUNCTION catalan(n):
    C = [0]*(n+1)
    C[0] = 1
    FOR i FROM 1 TO n:
        FOR j FROM 0 TO i-1:
            C[i] += C[j] * C[i-j-1]
    RETURN C[n]
examples.explanation: Implements the recursive Catalan formula derived from C(x)=1+xC(x)²

examples.title: GF Coefficient Extraction
examples.description: Computes coefficients from a generating function
examples.explanation: Uses symbolic computation to extract x^n coefficient
